about: Alex brings people together — a community builder who organises friendly matches and scenic runs. Known for upbeat playlists and welcoming first-timers.
Taylor is an energetic host who brings beach volleyball and group rides to life — always scouting new routes and new friends to join.
Jordan teaches calming outdoor yoga with a lighthearted sense of humor and an eye for accessible flows that suit all levels.
Morgan is a coach at heart — patient, encouraging, and focused on steady improvement in cricket and climbing sessions.
Casey organises family-friendly activities and relaxed swim meetups; great with kids and new swimmers, keeps things fun and safe.
Always smiling and chatty — loves meeting new people and joining social games on weekends.
Outdoor enthusiast who seeks long rides and sunrise hikes; happy to share snacks and route tips.
Competitive and focused — here to push limits and improve personal bests while still enjoying good company.
New to group activities, curious and keen to learn — asks lots of questions and cheers others on.
Laid-back and friendly — prefers casual sessions, relaxed company, and a good laugh after the game.
